text: **Anna:** Hello.
**Anna:** I have {lived|住んでいる} in Washington DC for a {long|長い} time now, and I have done a lot.
**Anna:** I feel that I know this city {pretty|とても/かなり} well.
**Anna:** Wait, that's the wrong way.
**Anna:** Where is it again?
**Anna:** Excuse me, can I help you?
**Anna:** Uh have we met before?
**Jean:** I don't think so.
**Jean:** I've just {flown|飛んでくる} in from Boston.
**Jean:** My name is Jean.
**Anna:** Hi, Jean.
**Anna:** I'm Anna.
**Anna:** I really feel like we've met before.
**Anna:** Anyway
**Anna:** How can I help?
**Jean:** I want to see an {interesting|興味深い} museum, but I don't know which one.
**Anna:** I can help with that.
**Anna:** I've {lived|住んでいる} in Washington, D.
**Anna:** C.
**Anna:** a long time.
**Anna:** I think I've seen all the museums.
**Jean:** Wow, thanks.
**Jean:** So tell me, which museums are good?
**Anna:** Well, they are all good, but they're all different.
**Anna:** There are science museums and history museums and art and {culture|文化} museums.
**Jean:** I want to see an {unusual|珍しい} museum.
**Anna:** I like the {sculpture|彫刻} garden.
**Jean:** Have you ever seen sculptures in a garden?
**Anna:** It is really
**Anna:** {Artistic|芸術的な}
**Jean:** I have never seen a {garden|庭/植物園|/ˈɡɑːrdən/|My garden has many flowers.} of {sculptures|彫刻/立体芸術|/ˈskʌlptʃərz/|These sculptures are beautiful.}
**Jean:** I'll write that on my list
**Anna:** Have you been to the Museum of the {American Indian|アメリカ先住民|/əˈmerɪkən ˈɪndiən/|American Indian culture is rich.}?
**Anna:** I've visited that museum many times.
**Anna:** It is very {peaceful|平和な/静かな|/ˈpiːsfəl/|The garden is peaceful today.}
**Jean:** I have always liked American Indian {culture|文化|/ˈkʌltʃər/|Japanese culture is unique.}
**Jean:** I'll put that on my list.
**Anna:** Do you have any other {suggestions|提案/助言|/səɡˈdʒestʃənz/|I have some good suggestions.}?
**Anna:** Well, if you like {plants|植物|/plænts/|Plants need water and sunlight.}, you can visit the U.
**Jean:** S.
**Anna:** Botanic {Gardens|庭園|/ˈɡɑːrdənz/|Botanical gardens are beautiful.}
**Anna:** It's very
**Anna:** {organic|有機の/自然の|/ɔːrˈɡænɪk/|Organic food is healthy.}
**Jean:** I have always loved {plants|植物|/plænts/|Some plants grow quickly.}
**Jean:** I'll write that on my list too.
**Jean:** Wow, you know so much about DC's {museums|博物館|/mjuˈziːəmz/|Museums have many exhibits.}
**Anna:** Well, I have lived here for over a year.
**Jean:** You're so lucky to live in such a {beautiful|美しい|/ˈbjuːtɪfəl/|The sunset is beautiful.} city filled with so many museums and a {zoo|動物園|/zuː/|The zoo has many animals.}
**Anna:** What?
**Anna:** DC has a zoo?
**Jean:** Yes, and it's beautiful.
**Jean:** You've lived here for so long and you haven't been to the zoo
**Anna:** I've never been to DC's zoo.
**Anna:** I've never been to any zoos.
**Jean:** You have never seen zoo {animals|動物|/ˈænɪməlz/|Zoo animals are fascinating.}?
**Anna:** I grew up on a {farm|農場|/fɑːrm/|My family owns a farm.}, Jean.
**Anna:** I've known farm {animals|動物|/ˈænɪməlz/|Farm animals live outdoors.} my whole life
**Jean:** But the zoo has {lions|ライオン|/ˈlaɪənz/|Lions are big cats.} and {elephants|ゾウ|/ˈeləfənts/|Elephants have long trunks.} and {zebras|シマウマ|/ˈziːbrəz/|Zebras have black and white stripes.}
**Anna:** If you have never seen a real live {elephant|ゾウ|/ˈeləfənt/|An elephant is very large.}, you must.
**Jean:** They are so {majestic|壮大な/威厳のある|/ˈmædʒɪstɪk/|The mountain looks majestic.}
**Anna:** I will.
**Anna:** There.
**Anna:** I've written my own {must-see|必見の/見逃せない|/ˈmʌstˈsiː/|This is a must-see movie.} zoo animal list.
**Jean:** Have fun at the zoo and thanks, Anna.
**Anna:** Have fun at the {museums|博物館/美術館|/ˈmjuːziəmz/|We visited many museums.}, Jean.
**Anna:** And thank you.
**Anna:** This has been {awesome|素晴らしい/素晴らしく楽しい|/ˈɔːsəm/|What an awesome day!}
**Anna:** And I have seen every {animal|動物|/ˈænɪməl/|I love animals.} on my list.
**Anna:** Jean, the {tourist|観光客|/ˈtʊərɪst/|Tourists visit many places.}, helped me see more of my city.
**Anna:** But where have I seen her before?
**Anna:** Oh well until next time
